epics.title: Payment Gateway Integration
epics.description: Integration with a payment gateway (Stripe) for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments, so that I can purchase products and services
stories.description: Integrate Stripe payment gateway for secure credit card transactions
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully processes a credit card payment and updates the order status
The system handles declined credit card payments and displays an error message to the customer

tasks.title: Setup Stripe payment gateway API
tasks.description: Configure Stripe API keys, setup payment intent, and implement payment method

tasks.title: Implement credit card payment form and validation
tasks.description: Create a secure payment form, validate user input, and handle payment submission

tasks.title: Test credit card payment functionality
tasks.description: Perform unit testing, integration testing, and UI testing for credit card payments

stories.title: As a customer, I want to manage my subscriptions, so that I can update or cancel my recurring payments
stories.description: Integrate Stripe subscription management for recurring payments and updates
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully creates and updates subscriptions, and sends notifications to the customer
The system handles subscription cancellations and updates the customer's account status

tasks.title: Implement subscription creation and update API
tasks.description: Use Stripe API to create and update subscriptions, and handle webhooks for payment events

tasks.title: Develop subscription management UI
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly interface for customers to manage their subscriptions

tasks.title: Test subscription management functionality
tasks.description: Perform unit testing, integration testing, and UI testing for subscription management

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to receive payment event notifications, so that I can track and manage payments
stories.description: Implement webhook handling for payment events and generate receipts
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully receives and processes payment event webhooks from Stripe
The system generates receipts for successful payments and sends email notifications to the customer

tasks.title: Setup Stripe webhook API
tasks.description: Configure Stripe webhook API, handle payment event notifications, and update payment status

tasks.title: Implement receipt generation and email notification
tasks.description: Generate receipts for successful payments and send email notifications to the customer

tasks.title: Test payment event notification and receipt generation
tasks.description: Perform unit testing, integration testing, and UI testing for payment event notification and receipt generation

epics.title: User Authentication System
epics.description: A comprehensive system for user authentication, including login, signup, password reset, and OAuth integration

stories.title: As a user, I want to login to the system using email and password, so that I can access my account securely
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using their email and password, with proper validation and error handling
acceptance_criteria: The system validates user credentials correctly and allows login with valid email and password
The system displays an error message when the user enters an invalid email or password
The system redirects the user to the dashboard after successful login

tasks.title: Implement email and password validation
tasks.description: Create a function to validate user email and password, and integrate it with the login form

tasks.title: Create login form with input fields and submit button
tasks.description: Design and implement the login form with email and password input fields, and a submit button

tasks.title: Integrate login form with backend API
tasks.description: Connect the login form to the backend API, and handle login requests and responses

stories.title: As a new user, I want to sign up for an account, so that I can use the system's features
stories.description: The system should allow new users to sign up for an account, with proper validation and email verification
acceptance_criteria: The system validates user input data correctly and creates a new account with valid data
The system sends a verification email to the user after signing up
The system displays an error message when the user enters invalid data

tasks.title: Implement user input validation for signup form
tasks.description: Create a function to validate user input data, such as email, password, and username

tasks.title: Create signup form with input fields and submit button
tasks.description: Design and implement the signup form with input fields for email, password, and username, and a submit button

tasks.title: Integrate signup form with email verification service
tasks.description: Connect the signup form to an email verification service, and handle email verification requests and responses

stories.title: As a user, I want to reset my password, so that I can recover my account when I forget my password
stories.description: The system should allow users to reset their password, with proper validation and email notification
acceptance_criteria: The system validates user email correctly and sends a password reset link
The system allows users to reset their password with a valid reset link
The system displays an error message when the user enters an invalid email or reset link

tasks.title: Implement password reset link generation and email sending
tasks.description: Create a function to generate a password reset link and send it to the user's email

tasks.title: Create password reset form with input fields and submit button
tasks.description: Design and implement the password reset form with input fields for new password and confirm password, and a submit button

tasks.title: Integrate password reset form with backend API
tasks.description: Connect the password reset form to the backend API, and handle password reset requests and responses

stories.title: As a user, I want to login to the system using OAuth with Google and GitHub, so that I can access my account securely and easily
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using OAuth with Google and GitHub, with proper validation and authorization
acceptance_criteria: The system redirects the user to the Google and GitHub authorization pages correctly
The system validates the authorization response from Google and GitHub correctly and logs the user in
The system displays an error message when the user cancels the authorization or enters invalid credentials

tasks.title: Implement OAuth authorization flow with Google
tasks.description: Create a function to redirect the user to the Google authorization page and handle the authorization response

tasks.title: Implement OAuth authorization flow with GitHub
tasks.description: Create a function to redirect the user to the GitHub authorization page and handle the authorization response

tasks.title: Integrate OAuth authorization flows with backend API
tasks.description: Connect the OAuth authorization flows to the backend API, and handle login requests and responses

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.description: A system for sending transactional emails to users for important events

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to integrate the email notification system with SendGrid, so that I can send transactional emails to users
stories.description: Integrate the email notification system with SendGrid to enable sending of transactional emails
acceptance_criteria: The system can successfully connect to SendGrid using a valid API key
The system can send a test email to a specified email address using SendGrid
The system can handle SendGrid API errors and exceptions

tasks.title: Research and implement SendGrid API integration
tasks.description: Integrate the SendGrid API into the email notification system

tasks.title: Implement error handling for SendGrid API errors
tasks.description: Handle and log SendGrid API errors and exceptions

tasks.title: Test SendGrid integration with sample emails
tasks.description: Test the SendGrid integration by sending sample emails

stories.title: As a developer, I want to create email templates for common events, so that I can easily customize and send transactional emails
stories.description: Create email templates for common events such as welcome emails, password reset links, and payment receipts
acceptance_criteria: The system has a template for each common event
The templates can be easily customized with user data
The templates are rendered correctly in the email client

tasks.title: Design and implement email template engine
tasks.description: Design and implement an email template engine to render templates with user data

tasks.title: Create email templates for common events
tasks.description: Create email templates for welcome emails, password reset links, and payment receipts

tasks.title: Test email template rendering with sample data
tasks.description: Test the email template engine with sample data

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive welcome emails with account information, so that I can easily access my account
stories.description: Send welcome emails to new users with account information
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a welcome email to new users with account information
The welcome email contains a link to the user's account dashboard
The welcome email is sent within 1 hour of account creation

tasks.title: Implement welcome email trigger on account creation
tasks.description: Trigger the welcome email on account creation

tasks.title: Customize welcome email template with account information
tasks.description: Customize the welcome email template with account information

tasks.title: Test welcome email sending with sample account creation
tasks.description: Test the welcome email sending with sample account creation

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to monitor email delivery and handle bounces, so that I can ensure reliable email delivery
stories.description: Monitor email delivery and handle bounces to ensure reliable email delivery
acceptance_criteria: The system can track email delivery status
The system can handle email bounces and update user email status
The system can alert administrators of email delivery issues

tasks.title: Implement email delivery tracking with SendGrid
tasks.description: Track email delivery status using SendGrid

tasks.title: Handle email bounces and update user email status
tasks.description: Handle email bounces and update user email status

tasks.title: Implement email delivery issue alerting for administrators
tasks.description: Alert administrators of email delivery issues

epics.title: Admin Dashboard
epics.description: A dashboard for internal team to manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics

stories.title: As an admin, I want to manage users, so that I can control access to the platform
stories.description: The admin should be able to create, update, and delete users from the dashboard
acceptance_criteria: The admin can create a new user with a unique username and password
The admin can update an existing user's details
The admin can delete a user and remove their access to the platform
The system prevents duplicate usernames

tasks.title: Design and implement user management UI
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly interface for managing users

tasks.title: Develop user management API endpoints
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for creating, updating, and deleting users

tasks.title: Implement user management business logic
tasks.description: Write code to handle user management operations and validate user data

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view analytics dashboards, so that I can monitor platform performance
stories.description: The admin should be able to view key metrics and analytics about the platform
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view a dashboard with key metrics such as active users and revenue
The admin can view detailed analytics about system performance
The admin can filter analytics data by date range
The system updates analytics data in real-time

tasks.title: Design and implement analytics dashboard UI
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly interface for viewing analytics

tasks.title: Develop analytics API endpoints
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving analytics data

tasks.title: Implement data visualization for analytics
tasks.description: Use a library to create interactive and dynamic charts and graphs

stories.title: As an admin, I want to monitor system health, so that I can identify and resolve issues
stories.description: The admin should be able to view system health metrics and error logs
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view system health metrics such as CPU usage and memory usage
The admin can view error logs with detailed information about errors
The admin can filter error logs by date range and severity
The system sends notifications to the admin when a critical error occurs

tasks.title: Develop system health monitoring API endpoints
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving system health metrics

tasks.title: Implement system health monitoring UI
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly interface for viewing system health metrics

tasks.title: Integrate notification system for critical errors
tasks.description: Use a notification library to send emails or notifications to the admin

stories.title: As an admin, I want to configure the platform, so that I can customize settings
stories.description: The admin should be able to configure platform settings such as notification preferences
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view and update platform settings
The admin can save changes to platform settings
The system validates user input for platform settings
The system updates platform settings in real-time

tasks.title: Develop configuration management API endpoints
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving and updating platform settings

tasks.title: Implement configuration management UI
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly interface for viewing and updating platform settings

tasks.title: Validate user input for platform settings
tasks.description: Write code to validate user input for platform settings

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view real-time analytics, so that I can monitor platform activity
stories.description: The admin should be able to view real-time analytics about platform activity
acceptance_criteria: The admin can view real-time analytics about platform activity
The admin can view detailed information about active users
The admin can filter real-time analytics data by date range
The system updates real-time analytics data in real-time

tasks.title: Develop real-time analytics API endpoints
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for retrieving real-time analytics data

tasks.title: Implement real-time analytics UI
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly interface for viewing real-time analytics

tasks.title: Integrate WebSockets for real-time updates
tasks.description: Use WebSockets to push real-time updates to the admin dashboard
